     correctly (was 0, now 10). Thinking detection updated.
     - **AT Distant Lands** downloading from IPT (25.4GB BluRay batch, about 12h ETA at
     current speed).
       [2026-03-17T04:11:35.117325+00:00] [sig_ts:1773720694959] Andrew Hall (he/him):
     detection is still broken. please have an agent create an e2e test that actually
     repros this issue

      during thinking and verifies detection.
